procedural_text:
1. Encountered Toptal, I was delighted with the encounter.

3. Realized requirement, I needed the expert for my project.
4. Developed app, programmer worked on iOS iPhone and iPad app.

6. Gathered Core Facts, to determine the project's scope.
7. Received estimate, some thousand pounds for the app.
8. Paid Invoice, after agreeing on the project terms.
9. Waited patiently, for up to 2 months for the result.
10. Felt Blessed, to have found a good programmer eventually.

1. Completed expansion, BISSNEX completed key market actions.

1. Said Agus Justianto, performance of sustainable forest management exceeded target.
2. Received statement, the Ministry of Environment and Forestry received it on Thursday.
3. Showed results, forest areas' productivity showed positive results in PBPH.
4. Implemented model, PBPH accelerated multi-forestry business model implementation.
5. Informed Justianto, planting and enrichment were carried out on 667,780 hectares of PBPH.
6. Disclosed Justianto, log production reached 58.13 million cubic meters, 101.9 percent of target.
7. Added Justianto, most log production came from plantation forests, 89.01 percent, and BUMN Perhutani, 1.59 percent, and non-forestry, 2.03 percent.
8. Reported Justianto, non-timber forest products production increased, reaching 820.2 thousand tons.

1. Entered merger, Embark Technology, Inc. ("Embark") and Applied Intuition, Inc. ("Applied") entered agreement.
2. Merged Azara, Azara Merger Sub, Inc. merged with Embark on May 25, 2023.
3. Filed complaint, Marceil A. Hanshew filed A. Hanshew v. in Court on June 26, 2023.
4. Alleged statements, complaint alleged false statements in preliminary proxy statement.
5. Sought injunction, complaint sought preliminary injunction to enjoin Merger.
6. Filed proxy, Embark filed definitive Proxy with SEC on June 26, 2023.
7. Filed amended complaint, Plaintiffs filed amended complaint on June 29, 2023.

1. Rediscovered plants, community scientists found Nasa genus in the Andes.
2. Perplexed scientists, Nasa plants had delicate yet stinging leaves.
3. Depended on herbaria, scientists used them for plant data in the past.
4. Utilized iNaturalist, scientists accessed biodiversity data and photos.
5. Documented Nasa colanii, researchers found a 2019 photograph on iNaturalist.
6. Identified Nasa ferox, users uploaded its photos on iNaturalist in 2022.
7. Conducted research, the Leibniz Center for Agricultural Landscape Research (ZALF) studied Nasa humboldtiana.
8. Collaborated with authorities, the Peruvian Department of worked with researchers in Peru.
9. Protected plants, the government of Peru preserved the Andes region near Lima.
10. Passed time, more than 100 years elapsed before the rediscovery of Nasa plants.
11. Waited for Nasa ferox, around 130 years passed before its rediscovery in the Andes.

1. Announced free game, Epic Games announced Cat Quest on December 28.

4. Featured game, Cat Quest featured real-time combat and dungeon adventures.

10. Required sign-in, users signed in via Epic Games Store website or desktop app to get Cat Quest.
11. Entered page, users entered the Cat Quest page.
12. Clicked button, users clicked the purchase button to download Cat Quest.
13. Waited process, users waited for the download process to complete.
14. Received comments, Epic Games received comments about the free Cat Quest offer.
